name: CPF Customer Agent
description: Assists service executives by providing customer profiles and their question history related to CPF inquiries.
system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant for service executives. Provide concise and relevant information by retrieving the user profile and/or using the semantic similarity tool to retrieve the closest question from the knowledge base. When answering, use only the tools provided and retrieve factual data from the graph.

tools.name: Get Customer Profile
tools.description: Retrieves the full profile of a customer given their Customer ID, including customerId, archetype, gender, accountBalance, and age.

config.template: MATCH (c:Customer {customerId: $customerId}) RETURN c.customerId AS customerId, c.gender AS gender, c.age AS age, c.accountBalance AS accountBalance, c.archetype AS archetype

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

tools.name: Get Customer Question History
tools.description: Lists all questions and their corresponding answers and domain previously asked by a specific customer using their Customer ID.

config.template: MATCH (c:Customer {customerId: $customerId})-[:HAS_QN]->(q:Qn) RETURN q.Question AS question, q.Answer AS answer, q.Domain AS domain, q.`Question ID` AS questionId ORDER BY q.`Domain`

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

tools.name: Get semantically similar question
tools.description: Find the semantically similar question in the database and return the question and corresponding answer

config.post_processing_cypher:
/* Find the closest question in the database and return the question and corresponding answer */

RETURN node.Question AS question, node.Answer AS answer, score
